title: peucedanum cervaria var. cuspidatum
intro: Peucedanum cervaria var. cuspidatum, also known as Cuspidate Peucedanum, is a variant of the Peucedanum cervaria plant, a type of fern-like herb belonging to the carrot family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory abilities, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits associated with Peucedanum cervaria var. cuspidatum include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory problems, and soothing digestive issues. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions and tinctures, often used in folk medicine to create remedies for colds, coughs, and other minor ailments.
